JONMI NAI ON KOO, ESQ.(PERKINS COIE), (415)344-7027, FOR Plaintiff/MOVING PARTY Fonality, Inc.
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE DEFENDANT/OPPOSING PARTY

TENTATIVE WAS ADOPTED AND MODIFIED: Plaintiff Fonality, Inc.'s Motion For Discovery Sanctions For Spoliation Of Evidence is granted. No opposition has been filed. Defendant is barred from introducing any evidence regarding what was not on the Home Computer or evidence regarding his actions regarding the removal of Fonality's source code, or any other data, from the Returned Hard Drive and copied to the Home Computer. MODIFICATION: TO INCLUDE LANGUAGE BARRING DENIALS OF HAVING WIPED CLEAN THE HARD DRIVE PRIOR TO SHIPPING. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. MATTER NOT REPORTED (EAH/612)
